list: Displays the completions that have been added
update:
update something.
eg. ${{root_cmd}} update  => check available update
    ${{root_cmd}} update *  => update all
    ${{root_cmd}} update [completion...]
update *: Update all completions that can be updated.
alias:
Change the alias that triggers completion.
eg. ${{root_cmd}} <list|add|rm|reset> [...]
alias add:
add completion alias.
eg. ${{root_cmd}} add scoop sco
And you can use "sco" to trigger completion
config root_cmd: Set PSCompletions alias, default to psc.
config language: Set language to en-US or zh-CN.
config github:
Get or change the address of github repo.
eg. ${{root_cmd}} config github https://github.com/<your_name>/<project_name>
config gitee: Get or change the address of gitee repo
config update:
Set update interval time (default to 7, in days)
Set to 0 to not automatically update，only use ${{root_cmd}} update to make a manual update.

PSCompletions_core_info.init_info:
✨✨✨PSCompletions(${{root_cmd}}) -- Init successfully!✨✨✨
(The following content is only displayed for the first time)
You just need to type ${{root_cmd}} and only "Tab"，You will quickly understand all commands.
For more information, please visit the project:
    Github: https://github.com/abgox/PSCompletions
    Gitee: https://gitee.com/abgox/PSCompletions
PSCompletions_core_info.description:
PSCompletions(${{root_cmd}}) -- Command completion manager
For more information, please visit the following project
    Github: https://github.com/abgox/PSCompletions
    Gitee: https://gitee.com/abgox/PSCompletions
PSCompletions_core_info.init_error: Init failed。file(${{file}}) download failed.Please check your network and Please check your network and retry.
PSCompletions_core_info.param_error:
Subcommand(${{error_cmd}}) error
It should be one of ${{cmds}}.
PSCompletions_core_info.add_download_error:
Completion(${{completion}}) add failed
${{completion}} completion's file(${{file}}) download error,please check your network.
PSCompletions_core_info.update_download_error:
Completion(${{completion}}) update failed
${{completion}} completion's file(${{file}}) download error,please check your network.
PSCompletions_core_info.add_error:
Completion(${{completion}}) isn't exist.
It's recommended to type "${{root_cmd}} add" and press "Tab" to complete.
Or type "${{root_cmd}} search" to search available completions.
PSCompletions_core_info.rm_error:
Remove completion(${{completion}}) failed. You haven't added  ${{completion}} yet.
It's recommended to type "${{root_cmd}} rm" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.which_error:
Locate completion(${{completion}}) failed. You haven't added  ${{completion}} yet.
It's recommended to type "${{root_cmd}} which" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.config_completed: ${{config}} => ${{value}} (If doesn't take effect, restart the terminal)
PSCompletions_core_info.update_tip: If you don't want to see it，please type "${{root_cmd}} config update 0"
PSCompletions_core_info.update_no: The added completions are all the latest!
PSCompletions_core_info.update_error:
Completion(${{completion}}) update failed, You haven't added ${{completion}} yet.
It's recommended to type "${{root_cmd}} update" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.cmd_error:
Subcommand(${{sub_cmd}}) isn't exist.
It's recommended to type "${{root_cmd}}" and press "Tab" to complete.
PSCompletions_core_info.check_update: Check if there are any updates in the installed completion. Continue?
PSCompletions_core_info.alias: Get or set the alias that triggers ${{completion}} completion
PSCompletions_core_info.alias_tip:
You should type alias to trigger completion If exist alias.
eg. You should use ${{root_cmd}} to trigger completion instead of PSCompletions
PSCompletions_core_info.alias_add:
The completion trigger command has been changed from ${{old}} to ${{new}}.
Please restart the terminal to take effect.
PSCompletions_core_info.alias_reset:
Reset all alias${{list}}
Please restart the terminal to take effect.
PSCompletions_core_info.reset_confirm: Reset all completion aliases,are you sure?
PSCompletions_core_info.confirm: Press Enter to continue，or press Ctrl + c to abort
PSCompletions_core_info.check_psc: Detected missing completion of PSCompletes module's own command (current alias ${{root_cmd}}), downloading...
PSCompletions_core_info.config_error:
Config(${{config}}) no exist
It's recommended to type "${{root_cmd}} config" and press "Tab" to complete.
